name_en: Model: M83480 Bucket Bag 💋💋 [Top-tier Original Batch Dynamic New Chip] Canoé Handbag. Crafted from Monogram canvas, it combines the Noé and Cannes handbags, merging the former's drawstring with the latter's molded bottom design for a trendy look and practical function. The woven chain and leather shoulder strap are detachable for multiple carrying styles. Monogram coated canvas - calfskin trim - microfiber lining - metal hardware - drawstring closure - fits smartphone, keys, compact wallet, headphones - Shoulder strap: detachable, adjustable!!; Dimensions: 14x20.5x14CM
